## Testing

See [docs/TESTING.md](../docs/TESTING.md) for the tier/decision matrix.

- [ ] Added/updated tests at the right layers (unit / integration / e2e / smoke)
- [ ] New user-facing flow → added/updated a `@critical` e2e (or justified below why not)
- [ ] `pnpm test:local` passes (or noted what was skipped and why)
